topic: Someone finds out their best friend is moving across the country
raw_output:
[story 1]

Maya stared at the packing boxes stacked precariously by the door, a wide, almost goofy grin stretching across her face. Liam was actually leaving. Across the country! Her heart gave a little flip-flop in her chest, a rapid, joyful drumming against her ribs. She bounced on the balls of her feet, unable to contain the sheer scope of the adventure unfolding. "Seriously? You're actually doing this?" she exclaimed, her voice pitched higher than usual, a bright, almost breathless sound. She grabbed Liam’s arm, her grip firm, and squeezed it tight. "This is incredible! Think of all the new places we'll see, all the ridiculous things we'll do!" She couldn't stop shaking her head, picturing the endless horizons awaiting them.

[story 2]

When Chloe finally pieced together the truth from a hastily scribbled note tucked inside a forgotten textbook, a wave of pure exhilaration washed over her. She let out a sharp, involuntary laugh, the sound bubbling up from deep in her belly. She paced the small apartment, her energy practically vibrating off her skin. "No way! You're actually relocating?" she shouted to the empty room, her eyes shining with an almost manic light. She started doing little celebratory hops, her movements light and quick, as if she could physically leap across state lines right then and there. A huge smile plastered itself on her face, the kind that reached her eyes, as she mentally started planning their first cross-country road trip itinerary.

[story 3]

"Wait, wait, wait," Alex stammered, his jaw dropping as the reality of Liam packing his last suitcase hit him. A bright, unstoppable feeling surged through him, making his limbs feel light and ready to spring into action. He couldn't keep still; he started pacing the length of the living room, running a hand through his hair as if trying to physically channel the excitement bubbling inside him. "This is amazing! A whole new chapter, a whole new world!" he declared, his voice ringing with an almost giddy fervor. He turned to Liam, his expression beaming, his eyes wide and sparkling with uncontainable joy. "We have to celebrate! We have to plan everything!"
